explainability_notes: FinMind can reduce integration cost for Taiwan fundamental and market datasets.
FinMind report sections must carry source_ids and limitations.
Official source governance wins conflicts with MOPS, TWSE, or Shioaji.

freshness_policy.runtime_requirement: validate dataset period, freshness, schema, and source attribution before formal report use
freshness_policy.stale_data_action: mark section stale and keep advisory only

integration_policy.daily_report_integration_next_step: map validated sections into daily report supplemental blocks
integration_policy.prediction_context_next_step: use only as attributed supplemental context after freshness validation
